# The Red Arrow ◆

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Artifact. Item.*

---

Limit 1 per deck. Attach to a **_Gondor**_ hero.
Attached hero gets +1 WP.
**Valour Response:** After attached hero quests successfully, add The Red Arrow to the victory display to search the top 5 cards of your deck for an ally and put it into play.

---

> *"The Red Arrow has not been seen in the Mark in all my years!" -Théoden, The Return of the King*
